search_document:
User Request: Supplier performance.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Supplier Performance Overview
Type: chart
Description: Performance metrics of suppliers over time
Title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: Suppliers generating the highest revenue
Title: Total Supplier Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue generated from suppliers
Title: Supplier Order Volume
Type: chart
Description: Number of orders placed with each supplier
Title: Supplier Delivery Performance
Type: chart
Description: On-time delivery rates of suppliers

sql_queries.title: Supplier Performance Overview
sql_queries.description: Performance metrics of suppliers over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY s.SupplierID ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY s.SupplierID ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Supplier Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM 'Order Details' od

sql_queries.title: Supplier Order Volume
sql_queries.description: Number of orders placed with each supplier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY s.SupplierID ORDER BY TotalOrders DESC

sql_queries.title: Supplier Delivery Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, AVG(CASE WHEN o.ShippedDate <= o.RequiredDate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OnTimeDeliveryRate FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY s.SupplierID
